title: Donor case selection protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8nnl7","text":"Inclusion","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"89mmr","text":"Age 18-35 or 50 and over","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9p8jl","text":"English Speaking","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"63mme","text":"Able to provide consent","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3brrf","text":"Undergoing reconstructive or aesthetic procedures necessitating skin excision at the scalp or abdomen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"90k5i","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fq2od","text":"Exclusion","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"497he","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1ilg8","text":"Known collagen disorder","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"as061","text":"Strong personal history of keloid formation","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9shcb","text":"Deemed unfit for general anesthesia","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a462","text":"Active infection of skin where samples may be taken","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Patient samples will be obtained from skin that is to be discarded from patients presenting for reconstructive or aesthetic procedures necessitating skin excision. No other procedures or follow-up is needed for research purposes.

Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Inclusion Age 18-35 or 50 and over English Speaking Able to provide consent Undergoing reconstructive or aesthetic procedures necessitating skin excision at the scalp or abdomen Exclusion Known collagen disorder Strong personal history of keloid formation Deemed unfit for general anesthesia Active infection of skin where samples may be taken
creator: Kyu Sang Han
